# Contributing to the Project

We welcome contributions to this project! If you would like to contribute, please follow these guidelines:

- Create a new branch for your changes.
- Make sure to write clear and concise commit messages.
- Pull Request your changes to the `main` branch.
- Ensure that your code passes all tests and linting checks.
- Update the documentation if necessary.

## Setting Up the Development Environment

To set up the development environment, please follow the instructions in the [README](../README.md) file.

## Standards, Conventions and Best Practices

### Linting

The repository contains various linting tools to ensure code quality and consistency. Please run the linters before submitting your changes.
Instructions for running the linters can be found in the [README](../README.md) file.

GitHub Actions are set up to run the linters on every pull request and push to `main`. If the linters fail, please fix the issues before submitting your changes.
